name: GuP: DAS UNIVERSUM
description:
Girls und Panzer: DAS UNIVERSUM.

Twenty two schools, Fifty-eight characters.

———————————————————————————

~ spoiler warning for the people who havent watched girls und panzer yet, be warned! ~

The biggest and most complex detailed RPG of, you guessed it, Girls und Panzer. Named 'Das Universum', it was a project started months ago and was an accumulation of 60 Girls und Panzer bots from my profile, a true finale near the end of these series of bots. With the lorebook adding to about a colossal 35,000 tokens, this is by far possibly the most detailed GuP bot you will see. A massive project from me, and I never thought I would actually release it (since im a lazy bum), but here we are.

Originally called "Die Universum" or just Universum, this bot is a mass collection of every single character I've made of Girls und Panzer since about half a year ago, so a mash up of 60 different bots all in one. Many, many tokens, and many errors are to be expected. This shouldn't be updated too much, but now and then, it will be, for bug fixes and yadayada.

The below are all the school's and characters in depth. If there are any inaccuracies just write down a review. There is 2 main type of characters, non-lorebook and lorebook. The lorebook ones vary in detail, whether or not theres a full character description or a smaller one is based off of how well they are showcased in the Anime, but the main difference between lorebooks and non-lorebooks is that the lorebook is triggered by key words, like their school name, their operated tank, or their nation.

Commanders: Kay, Darjeeling, Miho, Maho, Anzai 'Anchovy', Mika, Marie, Kinuyo, Katyusha, Shizuka, Yuko

Vice Commanders: Erika, Alisa, Pepperoni, Carpaccio, Naomi, Nonna, Andou, Oshida

Side Characters: Klara, Fukuda, Yukari, Saori, Hana, Mako, Erwin, Caesar, Noriko, Taeko, Shinobu Kawanishi, Akebi, Rin, Aki, Mikko, Koume, Helmet-Chan, Rosehip, Assam, Orange Pekoe, Emma

Lorebook Characters: Jajka, Sari Maruyama, Ayumi Yamagou, Karina Saraguchi, Yuuki Utsugi, Aya Oono, Nozomi Koparu, Moyoko Gotou, Oryou, Saemonza, Piyotan, Momoga, Keiko, Maria Suzuki, Muuton Tsuchiya

Schools currently described in detail: Ooarai, Kuromorimine, Pravda, Anzio, Saunders, St. Gloriana, Continuation, Chi-Ha-Tan, BC Freedom

Minor Schools described with lesser detail: Koala Forest, Maginot, Bellwall, Bonple, Blue Division, Count, Gregor, Gilbert, Maple, Tategoto, Viggen, Tatenashi, Waffle

Tankathlon Teams: Centipede Team (Tatenashi), Flying Tankers Volunteer Group (Saunders), Chindits (St. Gloriana), Nibelungen Team (Maho's), Schwarzwald Kampfgruppe (Erika's), Duck Team (Ooarai), Polite Girls (Pravda), Fifth Republic Platoon (BC Freedom)

this was made with deepseek in mind or literally anything else than JLLM. if you use jllm ur cooked

———————————————————————————
